description: Build auth system, user CRUD, and tests for the Express API

tasks.name: JWT Authentication
tasks.prompt:
Implement JWT authentication for this Express.js API.

Project structure: src/routes/, src/middleware/, src/models/ (Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL).

Requirements:
1. Create src/middleware/auth.js with verifyToken middleware
2. Create src/routes/auth.js with POST /login and POST /register endpoints
3. Use bcrypt for password hashing, jsonwebtoken for tokens
4. Add refresh token rotation (store in httpOnly cookies)
5. Add rate limiting on auth endpoints (express-rate-limit)

Conventions: Use async/await, Prisma for DB, Zod for validation.
Success criteria: All auth routes return proper status codes, tokens are signed and verified correctly.
tasks.system_prompt_append: This project uses Express 5, Prisma 6, and TypeScript. Follow existing patterns in src/routes/health.ts for route structure.
tasks.rationale: Sonnet handles auth implementation well. 20 turns for multi-file creation (middleware, routes, model updates, env config). No dependencies — can start immediately.

tasks.name: User CRUD API
tasks.prompt:
Create a complete CRUD API for users in this Express.js project.

Project structure: src/routes/, src/models/ (Prisma with PostgreSQL).

Requirements:
1. Create src/routes/users.ts with GET /users, GET /users/:id, PUT /users/:id, DELETE /users/:id
2. Add pagination on GET /users (query params: page, limit, sort)
3. Add input validation with Zod schemas
4. Add proper error handling with consistent error response format
5. Users should NOT be able to update their own role

Conventions: async/await, Prisma for DB, Zod for validation.
Do NOT implement authentication — it will be added separately.
Success criteria: All endpoints return correct status codes, pagination works, validation rejects bad input.
tasks.rationale: Sonnet for standard CRUD. Independent from auth — no dependency needed. 15 turns sufficient for routes + validation.

tasks.name: Integration Tests
tasks.prompt:
Write integration tests for the auth and user CRUD endpoints of this Express.js API.

Project structure: src/routes/auth.ts, src/routes/users.ts, tests/

Requirements:
1. Use Vitest + Supertest
2. Create tests/setup.ts with test database setup (use Prisma with a test database URL)
3. Create tests/auth.test.ts testing: register, login, refresh token, invalid credentials
4. Create tests/users.test.ts testing: CRUD operations, pagination, validation errors, unauthorized access
5. Each test should be independent (clean DB between tests)

Conventions: Describe/it blocks, meaningful test names.
Success criteria: npm test passes with >80% coverage on auth and user routes.
tasks.rationale: Tests depend on both auth and CRUD being implemented first. Sonnet handles test writing well. 20 turns because test setup + multiple test files.

tasks.name: API Documentation Review
tasks.prompt:
Review this Express.js API codebase and generate a comprehensive API documentation summary.

Analyze:
1. All route files in src/routes/
2. All middleware in src/middleware/
3. Prisma schema in prisma/schema.prisma
4. Environment variables used

Output a markdown document (docs/API.md) with:
- Endpoint list with methods, paths, request/response examples
- Authentication flow description
- Error response format
- Environment variables needed
- Setup instructions
tasks.rationale: Doc generation from existing code — Haiku is sufficient and fast. Depends on auth + CRUD being done. 10 turns is plenty for reading + writing one markdown file.
